title: Create ADDONS
description: A modpack completely centred around the Create Mod and all of its many Addons!
body:
## We love the Create mod, and we wanted to share that love with all of you. So, we put together this little modpack, showcasing all of Create's incredible addons.

```
ALL credit goes towards the mod developers whom put the time and effort into creating such masterpieces.
```

**This pack has many Create Addons, including:**
- Aquatic Ambitions
- Bells & Whistles
- Big Cannons
- Big Contraptions
- Compressed
- Connected
- Confectionery
- Cooking with Create
- Copper and Zinc
- Copycats+
- Crafts & Additions
- Creating Space
- Design n' Decor
- Deep Dark
- Deepfried
- Deepslatify
- Diesel Generators
- Dreams & Desires
- Encased
- Enchantment Industry
- Extended Cogwheels
- Factory
- Goggles
- High Pressure
- Interactive
- Ironworks
- Jetpack
- Logistics
- Mechanical Chicken
- New Age
- Northstar
- Nuke
- Ore Processing
- Pattern Schematics
- Power Loader
- Recycle
- Slice & Dice
- Steam n' Rails
- Structures
- Stuff & Additions
- Sweets And Treats
- The Factory Must Grow
- Track Map
- Unlimited

**There are also multiple QOL mods:**
- Carry On
- Construction Wand
- Cosmic Horizons
- Durability Tooltip
- Durability Viewer
- EMI
- Forgmatica
- Framed Blocks
- Freecam
- Gamma Just Extreme Bright
- Jade
- Just Zoom
- Lot's of Macaw's mods
- Mod Menu
- Oculus
- Quark
- Quick Leaf Decay
- REE Eats
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Spartan Weaponry
- Storage Drawers
- Tinkers' Construct
- Traveller's Backpack
- Trowels
- Waystones
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map
- Almost every YUNG mod

**There are many mods for building, cooking, exploring and Create-ing. We hope you enjoy your Minecraft Adventures!**

### Known Issues:
> Due to the recent update, no known crashes have yet been reported.
